914	                pipeline_v.producer_tail(kv_producer_state)
915	
916	    @cute.jit
917	    def load_KV(
918	        self,
919	        tma_load_fn: Optional[Callable],
920	        paged_kv_manager: Optional[PagedKVManager],
921	        sX: cute.Tensor,
922	        block: Int32,
923	        pipeline_kv: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
924	        producer_state: pipeline.PipelineState,
925	        K_or_V: Literal["K", "V"],
926	        page_idx: Optional[Int32] = None,
927	    ):
928	        if const_expr(self.use_tma_KV):
929	            src_idx = block if const_expr(page_idx is None) else page_idx
930	            tma_load_fn(src_idx=src_idx, producer_state=producer_state)
931	        else:
932	            paged_kv_manager.load_KV(block, sX[None, None, producer_state.index], K_or_V)
933	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
934	        pipeline_kv.producer_commit(producer_state)
935	
936	    @cute.jit
937	    def mma(
938	        self,
939	        tiled_mma_qk: cute.TiledMma,
940	        tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
941	        mO: cute.Tensor,
942	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
943	        sQ: cute.Tensor,
944	        sK: cute.Tensor,
945	        sVt: cute.Tensor,
946	        sP: Optional[cute.Tensor],
947	        sO: cute.Tensor,
948	        learnable_sink: Optional[cute.Tensor],
949	        pipeline_k: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
950	        pipeline_v: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
951	        pipeline_q: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
952	        gmem_tiled_copy_O: cute.TiledCopy,
953	        tma_atom_O: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
954	        tidx: Int32,
955	        softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
956	        softmax_scale: Optional[Float32],
957	        block_info: BlockInfo,
958	        SeqlenInfoCls: Callable,
959	        AttentionMaskCls: Callable,
960	        TileSchedulerCls: Callable,
961	        blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors],
962	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
963	        fastdiv_mods=None,
964	    ):
965	        aux_tensors = aux_data.tensors
966	        warp_group_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(tidx // self.num_threads_per_warp_group)
967	        warp_group_thread_layout = cute.make_layout(
968	            self.num_wg_mma, stride=self.num_threads_per_warp_group
969	        )
970	        thr_mma_qk = tiled_mma_qk.get_slice(tidx)
971	        wg_mma_qk = tiled_mma_qk.get_slice(warp_group_thread_layout(warp_group_idx))
972	        wg_mma_pv = tiled_mma_pv.get_slice(warp_group_thread_layout(warp_group_idx))
973	        _, tSrQ, tSrK = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
974	            wg_mma_qk, (self.tile_m, self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim), sQ, sK
975	        )
976	        mma_qk_fn = partial(
977	            sm90_utils.gemm_zero_init, tiled_mma_qk, (self.tile_m, self.tile_n), tSrQ, tSrK
978	        )
979	        acc_O, tOrP, tOrVt = sm90_utils.partition_fragment_ABC(
980	            wg_mma_pv, (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv, self.tile_n), sP, sVt
981	        )
982	        mma_pv_fn = partial(sm90_utils.gemm_w_idx, tiled_mma_pv, acc_O, tOrP, tOrVt)
983	
984	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
985	        # Smem copy atom tiling
986	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
987	        smem_copy_atom_P = utils.get_smem_store_atom(
988	            self.arch.major * 10 + self.arch.minor, self.dtype
989	        )
990	        smem_thr_copy_P = cute.make_tiled_copy_C(smem_copy_atom_P, tiled_mma_qk).get_slice(tidx)
991	        tPsP = smem_thr_copy_P.partition_D(sP) if const_expr(sP is not None) else None
992	        smem_copy_params = SimpleNamespace(smem_thr_copy_P=smem_thr_copy_P, tPsP=tPsP)
993	
994	        self.mma_init()
995	
996	        q_consumer_phase = Int32(0)
997	        kv_consumer_state = pipeline.make_pipeline_state(
998	            pipeline.PipelineUserType.Consumer, self.num_stages
999	        )
1000	
1001	        tile_scheduler = TileSchedulerCls()
1002	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
1003	        softmax = Softmax.create(
1004	            softmax_scale_log2,
1005	            num_rows=acc_O.shape[0][0] * acc_O.shape[1],
1006	            softmax_scale=softmax_scale,
1007	        )
1008	
1009	        # For RescaleOBeforeGemm: persistent scores_scale across iterations
1010	        scores_scale = None
1011	        if const_expr(self.rescale_O_before_gemm):
1012	            scores_scale = cute.make_rmem_tensor_like(softmax.row_max, Float32)
1013	
1014	        mma_one_n_block_all = partial(
1015	            self.mma_one_n_block_intrawg_overlap
1016	            if const_expr(self.intra_wg_overlap)
1017	            else self.mma_one_n_block,
1018	            mma_qk_fn=mma_qk_fn,
1019	            pipeline_k=pipeline_k,
1020	            pipeline_v=pipeline_v,
1021	            acc_O=acc_O,
1022	            tOrP=tOrP,
1023	            smem_copy_params=smem_copy_params,
1024	            check_inf=True,
1025	            scores_scale=scores_scale,
1026	        )
1027	
1028	        process_first_half_block = partial(
1029	            self.first_half_block_overlap,
1030	            mma_qk_fn=mma_qk_fn,
1031	            pipeline_k=pipeline_k,
1032	            tOrP=tOrP,
1033	            smem_copy_params=smem_copy_params,
1034	            scores_scale=scores_scale,
1035	            softmax=softmax,
1036	            acc_O=acc_O,
1037	        )
1038	        process_last_half_block = partial(
1039	            self.last_half_block_overlap,
1040	            pipeline_v=pipeline_v,
1041	            mma_pv_fn=mma_pv_fn,
1042	            scores_scale=scores_scale,
1043	            softmax=softmax,
1044	            acc_O=acc_O,
1045	        )
1046	        while work_tile.is_valid_tile:
1047	            # if work_tile.is_valid_tile:
1048	
1049	            # shape: (atom_v_m * rest_m)
1050	            m_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
1051	            seqlen = SeqlenInfoCls(batch_idx)
1052	
1053	            # Recompute fastdiv_mods if necessary for varlen with aux_tensors
1054	            recompute_fastdiv_mods_q = cutlass.const_expr(
1055	                aux_tensors is not None and (seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q or seqlen.has_seqused_q)
1056	            )
1057	            recompute_fastdiv_mods_k = cutlass.const_expr(
1058	                aux_tensors is not None and (seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_k or seqlen.has_seqused_k)
1059	            )
1060	            if cutlass.const_expr(fastdiv_mods is not None):
1061	                seqlen_q_divmod, seqlen_k_divmod = fastdiv_mods
1062	                fastdiv_mods = (
1063	                    seqlen_q_divmod
1064	                    if not recompute_fastdiv_mods_q
1065	                    else FastDivmodDivisor(seqlen.seqlen_q),
1066	                    seqlen_k_divmod
1067	                    if not recompute_fastdiv_mods_k
1068	                    else FastDivmodDivisor(seqlen.seqlen_k),
1069	                )
1070	
1071	            mask = AttentionMaskCls(seqlen)
1072	            mask_fn = partial(
1073	                mask.apply_mask,
1074	                batch_idx=batch_idx,
1075	                head_idx=head_idx,
1076	                m_block=m_block,
1077	                thr_mma=thr_mma_qk,
1078	                mask_causal=self.is_causal,
1079	                mask_local=self.is_local,
1080	                aux_data=aux_data,
1081	                fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
1082	            )
1083	            score_mod_fn = None
1084	            if const_expr(self.score_mod is not None):
1085	                score_mod_fn = partial(
1086	                    self.apply_score_mod,
1087	                    thr_mma_qk,
1088	                    batch_idx,
1089	                    head_idx,
1090	                    m_block,
1091	                    softmax_scale=softmax_scale,
1092	                    aux_data=aux_data,
1093	                    fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
1094	                )
1095	            mma_one_n_block = partial(
1096	                mma_one_n_block_all, seqlen=seqlen, softmax=softmax, score_mod_fn=score_mod_fn
1097	            )
1098	            n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(seqlen, m_block)
1099	            pipeline_q.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(0, q_consumer_phase)
1100	            # For performance reason, we separate out two kinds of iterations:
1101	            # those that need masking on S, and those that don't.
1102	            # We need masking on S for the very last block when K and V has length not multiple of tile_n.
1103	            # We also need masking on S if it's causal, for the last several blocks.
1104	            # softmax.reset()  # Don't need reset as we explicitly call softmax w is_first=True
1105	            O_should_accumulate = False
1106	
1107	            # ==========================================
1108	            # MAINLOOP
1109	            # ==========================================
1110	            if const_expr(not self.use_block_sparsity):
1111	                # ==========================================
1112	                # No block-sparsity (original path)
1113	                # ==========================================
1114	                # First iteration with seqlen masking
1115	                if const_expr(self.intra_wg_overlap):
1116	                    kv_consumer_state = process_first_half_block(
1117	                        n_block=n_block_max - 1,
1118	                        seqlen=seqlen,
1119	                        kv_consumer_state=kv_consumer_state,
1120	                        mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod),
1121	                        score_mod_fn=score_mod_fn,
1122	                        is_first_block=True,
1123	                    )
1124	                else:
1125	                    self.warp_scheduler_barrier_sync()
1126	                    kv_consumer_state = mma_one_n_block(
1127	                        kv_consumer_state,
1128	                        n_block=n_block_max - 1,
1129	                        seqlen=seqlen,
1130	                        mma_pv_fn=partial(mma_pv_fn, zero_init=True),
1131	                        is_first_n_block=True,
1132	                        mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=True),
1133	                    )
1134	                    O_should_accumulate = True
1135	                # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 128: cute.printf("m_block = {}, n_block_max = {}, n_block_min = {}", m_block, n_block_max, n_block_min)
1136	                n_block_max -= 1
1137	                # Next couple of iterations with causal masking
1138	                if const_expr(self.is_causal or self.is_local):
1139	                    n_block_min_causal_local_mask = block_info.get_n_block_min_causal_local_mask(
1140	                        seqlen, m_block, n_block_min
1141	                    )
1142	                    # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 128: cute.printf("n_block_min_causal_local_mask = {}", n_block_min_causal_local_mask)
1143	                    for n_tile in cutlass.range(
1144	                        n_block_max - n_block_min_causal_local_mask, unroll=1
1145	                    ):
1146	                        kv_consumer_state = mma_one_n_block(
1147	                            kv_consumer_state,
1148	                            n_block=n_block_max - 1 - n_tile,
1149	                            seqlen=seqlen,
1150	                            mma_pv_fn=partial(mma_pv_fn, zero_init=not O_should_accumulate),
1151	                            mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=False),
1152	                        )
1153	                        O_should_accumulate = True
1154	                    n_block_max = cutlass.min(n_block_max, n_block_min_causal_local_mask)
1155	                # The remaining iterations have no masking
1156	                n_block_min_before_local_mask = block_info.get_n_block_min_before_local_mask(
1157	                    seqlen, m_block, n_block_min
1158	                )
1159	                # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 128: cute.printf("n_block_min_before_local_mask = {}, n_block_min = {}", n_block_min_before_local_mask, n_block_min)
1160	                for n_tile in cutlass.range(n_block_max - n_block_min_before_local_mask, unroll=1):
1161	                    kv_consumer_state = mma_one_n_block(
1162	                        kv_consumer_state,
1163	                        n_block=n_block_max - 1 - n_tile,
1164	                        seqlen=seqlen,
1165	                        mma_pv_fn=partial(mma_pv_fn, zero_init=not O_should_accumulate),
1166	                        mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=False),
1167	                    )
1168	                    O_should_accumulate = True
1169	                # Separate iterations with local masking on the left
1170	                if const_expr(self.is_local and block_info.window_size_left is not None):
1171	                    n_block_max = cutlass.min(n_block_max, n_block_min_before_local_mask)
1172	                    for n_tile in cutlass.range(n_block_max - n_block_min, unroll=1):
1173	                        kv_consumer_state = mma_one_n_block(
1174	                            kv_consumer_state,
1175	                            n_block=n_block_max - 1 - n_tile,
1176	                            seqlen=seqlen,
1177	                            mma_pv_fn=partial(mma_pv_fn, zero_init=not O_should_accumulate),
1178	                            mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=False),
1179	                        )
1180	                        O_should_accumulate = True
1181	                # Release Q pipeline so the producer can load the next tile's Q
1182	                pipeline_q.consumer_release_w_index(0)
1183	                # Last "half" iteration
1184	                if const_expr(self.intra_wg_overlap):
1185	                    kv_consumer_state = process_last_half_block(
1186	                        kv_consumer_state=kv_consumer_state,
1187	                        zero_init=not O_should_accumulate,
1188	                    )
1189	                    O_should_accumulate = True
1190	                else:
1191	                    self.warp_scheduler_barrier_arrive()
1192	
1193	            else:
1194	                # ==========================================
1195	                # Block sparsity
1196	                # ==========================================
1197	                kv_consumer_state, O_should_accumulate, processed_any = consume_block_sparse_loads(
1198	                    blocksparse_tensors,
1199	                    batch_idx,
1200	                    head_idx,
1201	                    m_block,
1202	                    seqlen,
1203	                    kv_consumer_state,
1204	                    mma_pv_fn,
1205	                    mma_one_n_block,
1206	                    process_first_half_block,
1207	                    process_last_half_block,
1208	                    mask_fn,
1209	                    score_mod_fn,
1210	                    O_should_accumulate,
1211	                    self.mask_mod,
1212	                    fastdiv_mods,
1213	                    self.intra_wg_overlap,
1214	                    self.warp_scheduler_barrier_sync,
1215	                    self.warp_scheduler_barrier_arrive,
1216	                    self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1217	                    self.q_subtile_factor,
1218	                )
1219	
1220	                # Release Q pipeline so the producer can load the next tile's Q
1221	                pipeline_q.consumer_release_w_index(0)
1222	
1223	                # Handle empty case (when no blocks to process)
1224	                if not processed_any:
1225	                    softmax.reset()
1226	                    acc_O.fill(0.0)
1227	
1228	            q_consumer_phase ^= 1
1229	
1230	            sink_val = None
1231	            if const_expr(learnable_sink is not None):
1232	                if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa):
1233	                    sink_val = Float32(learnable_sink[head_idx])
1234	                else:  # Each thread might have a different sink value due to different q_head
1235	                    sink_val = cute.make_rmem_tensor_like(softmax.row_max, Float32)
1236	                    cS = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_m, self.tile_n))
1237	                    tScS_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cS))
1238	                    for r in cutlass.range(cute.size(sink_val), unroll_full=True):
1239	                        row = m_block * self.tile_m + tScS_mn[r][0]
1240	                        q_head_idx = row % self.qhead_per_kvhead + head_idx * self.qhead_per_kvhead
1241	                        sink_val[r] = Float32(learnable_sink[q_head_idx])
1242	
1243	            # normalize acc_O by row_sum and calculate the lse
1244	            row_scale = softmax.finalize(sink_val=sink_val)
1245	            softmax.rescale_O(acc_O, row_scale)
1246	
1247	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1248	            # Epilogue
1249	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1250	            self.epilogue(
1251	                acc_O,
1252	                softmax.row_sum,
1253	                mO,
1254	                mLSE,
1255	                sO,
1256	                seqlen,
1257	                gmem_tiled_copy_O,
1258	                tma_atom_O,
1259	                tiled_mma_pv,
1260	                tidx,
1261	                m_block,
1262	                head_idx,
1263	                batch_idx,
1264	            )
1265	
1266	            tile_scheduler.advance_to_next_work()
1267	            work_tile = tile_scheduler.get_current_work()
1268	
1269	    @cute.jit
1270	    def first_half_block_overlap(
1271	        self,
1272	        n_block: Int32,
1273	        mma_qk_fn: Callable,
1274	        kv_consumer_state,
1275	        pipeline_k,
1276	        tOrP: cute.Tensor,
1277	        smem_copy_params: SimpleNamespace,
1278	        softmax: Softmax,
1279	        seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1280	        scores_scale: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
1281	        acc_O: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
1282	        mask_fn: Callable = None,
1283	        score_mod_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1284	        is_first_block: bool = False,
1285	    ):
1286	        """Processes the first half block when using intra-warpgroup-overlap"""
1287	
1288	        pipeline_k.consumer_wait(kv_consumer_state, pipeline_k.consumer_try_wait(kv_consumer_state))
1289	        acc_S = mma_qk_fn(B_idx=kv_consumer_state.index, wg_wait=0)
1290	        pipeline_k.consumer_release(kv_consumer_state)
1291	
1292	        # Apply score modification if present
1293	        if const_expr(score_mod_fn is not None):
1294	            score_mod_fn(acc_S, n_block=n_block, seqlen=seqlen)
1295	
1296	        # Apply mask; mask_seqlen always True for first block
1297	        # Caveat: if full block further right than mask block, seqlen masking is redundant;
1298	        # however, masking is being applied anyway, so essentially no perf hit
1299	        mask_fn(acc_S, n_block=n_block, mask_seqlen=True)
1300	
1301	        row_scale = softmax.online_softmax(acc_S, is_first=is_first_block)
1302	
1303	        tOrP_acc = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(acc_S)
1304	        tOrP_cur = (
1305	            tOrP
1306	            if const_expr(self.mma_pv_is_rs)
1307	            else cute.make_rmem_tensor_like(tOrP_acc, self.dtype)
1308	        )
1309	        tOrP_cur.store(tOrP_acc.load().to(self.dtype))
1310	
1311	        if const_expr(not self.mma_pv_is_rs):
1312	            tPrP = smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_P.retile(tOrP_cur)
1313	            cute.copy(smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_P, tPrP, smem_copy_params.tPsP)
1314	            # Fence and barrier to make smem store visible to WGMMA
1315	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1316	            cute.arch.sync_warp()
1317	
1318	        # For RescaleOBeforeGemm: initialize acc_O
1319	        if const_expr(self.rescale_O_before_gemm):
1320	            acc_O.fill(0.0)
1321	            scores_scale.store(row_scale.load())
1322	
1323	        return kv_consumer_state
1324	
1325	    @cute.jit
1326	    def last_half_block_overlap(
1327	        self,
1328	        kv_consumer_state,
1329	        pipeline_v,
1330	        mma_pv_fn: Callable,
1331	        zero_init: bool,
1332	        scores_scale: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
1333	        softmax: Optional[Softmax] = None,
1334	        acc_O: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
1335	    ):
1336	        """Processes the final PV GEMM when using intra-warpgroup-overlap"""
1337	
1338	        # For RescaleOBeforeGemm: rescale O before the final PV GEMM
1339	        if const_expr(self.rescale_O_before_gemm):
1340	            softmax.rescale_O(acc_O, scores_scale)
1341	
1342	        pipeline_v.consumer_wait(kv_consumer_state, pipeline_v.consumer_try_wait(kv_consumer_state))
1343	        mma_pv_fn(B_idx=kv_consumer_state.index, zero_init=zero_init, wg_wait=0)
1344	        pipeline_v.consumer_release(kv_consumer_state)
1345	        kv_consumer_state.advance()
1346	        return kv_consumer_state
1347	
1348	    @cute.jit
1349	    def mma_one_n_block(
1350	        self,
1351	        smem_pipe_read: pipeline.PipelineState | pipeline_custom.PipelineStateSimple,
1352	        n_block: Int32,
1353	        mma_qk_fn: Callable,
1354	        mma_pv_fn: Callable,
1355	        pipeline_k: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1356	        pipeline_v: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1357	        acc_O: cute.Tensor,
1358	        tOrP: cute.Tensor,
1359	        smem_copy_params: SimpleNamespace,
1360	        softmax: Softmax,
1361	        seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1362	        scores_scale: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,  # not used
1363	        score_mod_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1364	        mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1365	        is_first_n_block: cutlass.Constexpr = False,
1366	        check_inf: cutlass.Constexpr = True,
1367	    ):
1368	        pipeline_k.consumer_wait(smem_pipe_read, pipeline_k.consumer_try_wait(smem_pipe_read))
1369	        # S = Q @ K.T
1370	        acc_S = mma_qk_fn(B_idx=smem_pipe_read.index, wg_wait=-1)
1371	        self.warp_scheduler_barrier_arrive()
1372	        warpgroup.wait_group(0)
1373	        pipeline_k.consumer_release(smem_pipe_read)
1374	
1375	        # handle score mods and masking
1376	        if const_expr(score_mod_fn is not None):
1377	            score_mod_fn(acc_S, n_block=n_block, seqlen=seqlen)
1378	        if const_expr(mask_fn is not None):
1379	            mask_fn(acc_S=acc_S, n_block=n_block)
1380	
1381	        row_scale = softmax.online_softmax(acc_S, is_first=is_first_n_block, check_inf=check_inf)
1382	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 0: cute.print_tensor(layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_S))
1383	        tOrP_acc = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(acc_S)
1384	        tOrP_cur = (
1385	            tOrP
1386	            if const_expr(self.mma_pv_is_rs)
1387	            else cute.make_rmem_tensor_like(tOrP_acc, self.dtype)
1388	        )
1389	        # tOrP.store(tOrP_acc.load().to(self.dtype))
1390	        # the "to(self.dtype)" conversion fails to vectorize for block sizes other
1391	        # than 128 x 128, i.e. it calls convert on 1 fp32 element at a time instead of
1392	        # 2 elements. So we just call ptx directly.
1393	        utils.cvt_f16(tOrP_acc, tOrP_cur)
1394	        if const_expr(not self.mma_pv_is_rs):
1395	            tPrP = smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_P.retile(tOrP_cur)
1396	            cute.copy(smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_P, tPrP, smem_copy_params.tPsP)
1397	        softmax.rescale_O(acc_O, row_scale)
1398	        if const_expr(not self.mma_pv_is_rs):
1399	            # Fence and barrier to make sure smem store is visible to WGMMA
1400	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1401	            cute.arch.sync_warp()  # Only need syncwarp since each warp is using its own P values for MmaPV
1402	        pipeline_v.consumer_wait(smem_pipe_read, pipeline_v.consumer_try_wait(smem_pipe_read))
1403	        self.warp_scheduler_barrier_sync()
1404	        # O += P @ V
1405	        mma_pv_fn(B_idx=smem_pipe_read.index, wg_wait=0)
1406	        pipeline_v.consumer_release(smem_pipe_read)
1407	        smem_pipe_read.advance()
1408	        return smem_pipe_read
1409	
1410	    @cute.jit
1411	    def mma_one_n_block_intrawg_overlap(
1412	        self,
1413	        smem_pipe_read: pipeline.PipelineState | pipeline_custom.PipelineStateSimple,
1414	        n_block: Int32,
1415	        mma_qk_fn: Callable,
1416	        mma_pv_fn: Callable,
1417	        pipeline_k: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1418	        pipeline_v: pipeline.PipelineAsync,
1419	        acc_O: cute.Tensor,
1420	        tOrP: cute.Tensor,
1421	        smem_copy_params: SimpleNamespace,
1422	        softmax: Softmax,
1423	        seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1424	        scores_scale: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
1425	        score_mod_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1426	        mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1427	        check_inf: cutlass.Constexpr = True,
1428	    ):
1429	        smem_pipe_read_v = smem_pipe_read.clone()
1430	        smem_pipe_read.advance()
1431	        pipeline_k.consumer_wait(smem_pipe_read, pipeline_k.consumer_try_wait(smem_pipe_read))
1432	        self.warp_scheduler_barrier_sync()
1433	        # S = Q @ K.T
1434	        acc_S = mma_qk_fn(B_idx=smem_pipe_read.index, wg_wait=-1)
1435	        # RescaleOBeforeGemm: rescale O while QK GEMM is in flight, before PV GEMM
1436	        if const_expr(self.rescale_O_before_gemm):
1437	            softmax.rescale_O(acc_O, scores_scale)
1438	        pipeline_v.consumer_wait(smem_pipe_read_v, pipeline_v.consumer_try_wait(smem_pipe_read_v))
1439	        # O += P @ V
1440	        mma_pv_fn(B_idx=smem_pipe_read_v.index, wg_wait=-1)
1441	        self.warp_scheduler_barrier_arrive()
1442	        warpgroup.wait_group(1)
1443	        pipeline_k.consumer_release(smem_pipe_read)
1444	
1445	        # handle score mods and masking
1446	        if const_expr(score_mod_fn is not None):
1447	            score_mod_fn(acc_S, n_block=n_block, seqlen=seqlen)
1448	        if const_expr(mask_fn is not None):
1449	            mask_fn(acc_S=acc_S, n_block=n_block)
1450	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 128: cute.print_tensor(layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_S))
1451	
1452	        row_scale = softmax.online_softmax(acc_S, check_inf=check_inf)
1453	        warpgroup.wait_group(0)
1454	        pipeline_v.consumer_release(smem_pipe_read_v)
1455	        tOrP_acc = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(acc_S)
1456	        tOrP_cur = (
1457	            tOrP
1458	            if const_expr(self.mma_pv_is_rs)
1459	            else cute.make_rmem_tensor_like(tOrP_acc, self.dtype)
1460	        )
1461	        # tOrP_cur.store(tOrP_acc.load().to(self.dtype))
1462	        # the "to(self.dtype)" conversion fails to vectorize for block sizes other
1463	        # than 128 x 128, i.e. it calls convert on 1 fp32 element at a time instead of
1464	        # 2 elements. So we just call ptx directly.
1465	        utils.cvt_f16(tOrP_acc, tOrP_cur)
1466	        if const_expr(not self.mma_pv_is_rs):
1467	            tPrP = smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_P.retile(tOrP_cur)
1468	            cute.copy(smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_P, tPrP, smem_copy_params.tPsP)
1469	        if const_expr(not self.rescale_O_before_gemm):
1470	            softmax.rescale_O(acc_O, row_scale)
1471	        if const_expr(self.rescale_O_before_gemm):
1472	            scores_scale.store(row_scale.load())
1473	        if const_expr(not self.mma_pv_is_rs):
1474	            # Fence and barrier to make sure smem store is visible to WGMMA
1475	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
1476	            cute.arch.sync_warp()  # Only need syncwarp since each warp is using its own P values for MmaPV
1477	        return smem_pipe_read
1478	
1479	    @cute.jit
1480	    def mma_init(self):
1481	        warp_group_idx = utils.canonical_warp_group_idx(sync=False)
1482	        if const_expr(self.use_scheduler_barrier):
1483	            if warp_group_idx == 1:
1484	                cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1485	                    barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.WarpSchedulerWG1),
1486	                    number_of_threads=2 * self.num_threads_per_warp_group,
1487	                )
1488	
1489	    @cute.jit
1490	    def apply_score_mod(
1491	        self,
1492	        thr_mma_qk,
1493	        batch_idx,
1494	        head_idx,
1495	        m_block,
1496	        acc_S,
1497	        n_block,
1498	        softmax_scale,
1499	        seqlen,
1500	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
1501	        fastdiv_mods=None,
1502	    ):
1503	        # Prepare index tensor
1504	        cS = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_m, self.tile_n))
1505	        cS = cute.domain_offset((m_block * self.tile_m, n_block * self.tile_n), cS)
1506	        tScS = thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cS)
1507	
1508	        apply_score_mod_inner(
1509	            acc_S,
1510	            tScS,
1511	            self.score_mod,
1512	            batch_idx,
1513	            head_idx,
1514	            softmax_scale,
1515	            self.score_vec_size,
1516	            self.qk_acc_dtype,
1517	            aux_data,
1518	            fastdiv_mods,
1519	            seqlen_info=seqlen,
1520	            constant_q_idx=None,
1521	            qhead_per_kvhead=self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1522	        )
1523	
1524	    def warp_scheduler_barrier_sync(self):
1525	        if const_expr(self.use_scheduler_barrier):
1526	            cute.arch.barrier(
1527	                barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.WarpSchedulerWG1)
1528	                - 1
1529	                + utils.canonical_warp_group_idx(sync=False),
1530	                number_of_threads=2 * self.num_threads_per_warp_group,
1531	            )
1532	
1533	    def warp_scheduler_barrier_arrive(self):
1534	        if const_expr(self.use_scheduler_barrier):
1535	            assert self.num_wg_mma in [2, 3]
1536	            cur_wg = utils.canonical_warp_group_idx(sync=False) - 1
1537	            if const_expr(self.num_wg_mma == 2):
1538	                next_wg = 1 - cur_wg
1539	            else:
1540	                t = cur_wg + 1
1541	                next_wg = t % self.num_wg_mma
1542	            cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
1543	                barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.WarpSchedulerWG1) + next_wg,
1544	                number_of_threads=2 * self.num_threads_per_warp_group,
1545	            )
1546
