42	    def __init__(
43	        self,
44	        dtype: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
45	        head_dim: int,
46	        head_dim_v: Optional[int] = None,
47	        qhead_per_kvhead: int = 1,
48	        is_causal: bool = False,
49	        is_local: bool = False,
50	        pack_gqa: bool = True,
51	        tile_m: int = 128,
52	        tile_n: int = 128,
53	        num_stages: int = 1,
54	        num_threads: int = 128,
55	        Q_in_regs: bool = False,
56	        score_mod: Optional[cutlass.Constexpr] = None,
57	        mask_mod: Optional[cutlass.Constexpr] = None,
58	        has_aux_tensors: bool = False,
59	        q_subtile_factor: int = 1,
60	    ):
61	        """Initializes the configuration for a flash attention kernel.
62	
63	        All contiguous dimensions must be at least 16 bytes aligned, which means that the head dimension
64	        should be a multiple of 8.
65	
66	        :param head_dim: head dimension
67	        :type head_dim: int
68	        :param tile_m: m block size
69	        :type tile_m: int
70	        :param tile_n: n block size
71	        :type tile_n: int
72	        :param num_threads: number of threads
73	        :type num_threads: int
74	        :param is_causal: is causal
75	        :param score_mod: A callable that takes the attention scores and applies a modification.
76	            Callable signature: ``score_mod(scores, batch_idx, head_idx, q_idx, kv_idx, aux_tensors) -> Any``
77	        :param mask_mod: A callable that takes the attention scores and returns a boolean representing whether that score should be masked.
78	            Callable signature: ``mask_mod(batch_idx, head_idx, q_idx, kv_idx, aux_tensors) -> Boolean``
79	        """
80	        self.dtype = dtype
81	        # padding head_dim to a multiple of 16 as k_block_size
82	        hdim_multiple_of = 16
83	        self.tile_hdim = int(math.ceil(head_dim / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of)
84	        head_dim_v = head_dim_v if head_dim_v is not None else head_dim
85	        self.same_hdim_kv = head_dim == head_dim_v
86	        self.tile_hdimv = int(math.ceil(head_dim_v / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of)
87	        # Can save registers (and hence be faster) if we don't have to check hdim predication
88	        self.check_hdim_oob = head_dim != self.tile_hdim
89	        self.check_hdim_v_oob = head_dim_v != self.tile_hdimv
90	        self.qhead_per_kvhead = qhead_per_kvhead
91	        self.is_causal = is_causal
92	        self.is_local = is_local
93	        self.pack_gqa = pack_gqa
94	        self.tile_m = tile_m
95	        self.tile_n = tile_n
96	        self.num_threads = num_threads
97	        self.num_stages = num_stages
98	        self.q_subtile_factor = q_subtile_factor
99	        self.Q_in_regs = Q_in_regs
100	        self.score_mod = score_mod
101	        self.mask_mod = mask_mod
102	        self.qk_acc_dtype = Float32
103	        self.score_vec_size: cutlass.Constexpr = getattr(
104	            score_mod, "__vec_size__", 1 if cutlass.const_expr(has_aux_tensors) else 2
105	        )
106	        if self.score_vec_size > 2:
107	            raise ValueError(
108	                f"score_mod vec_size {self.score_vec_size} not supported on Sm80/90/120 "
109	                "due to accumulator thread ownership pattern."
110	            )
111	        self.mask_vec_size: cutlass.Constexpr = getattr(mask_mod, "__vec_size__", 1)
112	        if self.mask_vec_size > 1:
113	            raise ValueError(
114	                f"mask_mod vec_size {self.mask_vec_size} not supported on Sm80/90/120 "
115	                "due to accumulator thread ownership pattern."
116	            )
117	        self.arch = BaseDSL._get_dsl().get_arch_enum()
118	
119	    @staticmethod
120	    def can_implement(
121	        dtype,
122	        head_dim,
123	        head_dim_v,
124	        tile_m,
125	        tile_n,
126	        num_stages,
127	        num_threads,
128	        is_causal,
129	        Q_in_regs=False,
130	    ) -> bool:
131	        """Check if the kernel can be implemented with the given parameters.
132	
133	        :param dtype: data type
134	        :type dtype: cutlass.Numeric
135	        :param head_dim: head dimension
136	        :type head_dim: int
137	        :param tile_m: m block size
138	        :type tile_m: int
139	        :param tile_n: n block size
140	        :type tile_n: int
141	        :param num_threads: number of threads
142	        :type num_threads: int
143	        :param is_causal: is causal
144	        :type is_causal: bool
145	
146	        :return: True if the kernel can be implemented, False otherwise
147	        :rtype: bool
148	        """
149	        if dtype not in [cutlass.Float16, cutlass.BFloat16]:
150	            return False
151	        if head_dim % 8 != 0:
152	            return False
153	        if head_dim_v % 8 != 0:
154	            return False
155	        if tile_n % 16 != 0:
156	            return False
157	        if num_threads % 32 != 0:
158	            return False
159	        # Check if block size setting is out of shared memory capacity
160	        # Shared memory usage: Q tile + (K tile + V tile) where K and V use the same tile size
161	        smem_usage_Q = tile_m * head_dim * 2
162	        smem_usage_K = tile_n * head_dim * num_stages * 2
163	        smem_usage_V = tile_n * head_dim_v * num_stages * 2
164	        smem_usage_QV = (
165	            (smem_usage_Q + smem_usage_V) if not Q_in_regs else max(smem_usage_Q, smem_usage_V)
166	        )
167	        smem_usage = smem_usage_QV + smem_usage_K
168	        # TODO: sm86 and sm89
169	        smem_capacity = utils_basic.get_smem_capacity_in_bytes("sm_80")
170	        if smem_usage > smem_capacity:
171	            return False
172	        # Check if twice the block size is divisible by the number of threads
173	        if (tile_m * 2) % num_threads != 0:
174	            return False
175	        return True
176	
177	    def _check_type(
178	        self,
179	        mQ_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
180	        mK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
181	        mV_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
182	        mO_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
183	        mLSE_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
184	        mCuSeqlensQ_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
185	        mCuSeqlensK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
186	        mSeqUsedQ_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
187	        mSeqUsedK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
188	    ):
189	        # Get the data type and check if it is fp16 or bf16
190	        if const_expr(not (mQ_type == mK_type == mV_type == mO_type)):
191	            raise TypeError("All tensors must have the same data type")
192	        if const_expr(mQ_type not in [cutlass.Float16, cutlass.BFloat16]):
193	            raise TypeError("Only Float16 or BFloat16 is supported")
194	        if const_expr(mLSE_type not in [None, Float32]):
195	            raise TypeError("LSE tensor must be Float32")
196	        if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ_type not in [None, Int32]):
197	            raise TypeError("cu_seqlens_q tensor must be Int32")
198	        if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK_type not in [None, Int32]):
199	            raise TypeError("cu_seqlens_k tensor must be Int32")
200	        if const_expr(mSeqUsedQ_type not in [None, Int32]):
201	            raise TypeError("seqused_q tensor must be Int32")
202	        if const_expr(mSeqUsedK_type not in [None, Int32]):
203	            raise TypeError("seqused_k tensor must be Int32")
204	        assert mQ_type == self.dtype
205	
206	    def _setup_attributes(self):
207	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
208	        # Shared memory layout: Q/K/V
209	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
210	        sQ_layout_atom, sK_layout_atom, sV_layout_atom, sO_layout_atom, sP_layout_atom = (
211	            self._get_smem_layout_atom()
212	        )
213	        self.sQ_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
214	            sQ_layout_atom,
215	            (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim),
216	            (0, 1),
217	        )
218	        self.sK_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
219	            sK_layout_atom,
220	            (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim, self.num_stages),
221	            (0, 1, 2),
222	        )
223	        self.sV_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
224	            sV_layout_atom,
225	            (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv, self.num_stages),
226	            (0, 1, 2),
227	        )
228	        self.sO_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
229	            sO_layout_atom,
230	            (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv),
231	            (0, 1),
232	        )
233	        if const_expr(sP_layout_atom is not None):
234	            self.sP_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
235	                sP_layout_atom,
236	                (self.tile_m, self.tile_n),
237	                (0, 1),
238	            )
239	        else:
240	            self.sP_layout = None
241	
242	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
243	        # GMEM Tiled copy:
244	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
245	        # Thread layouts for copies
246	        universal_copy_bits = 128
247	        async_copy_elems = universal_copy_bits // self.dtype.width
248	        # atom_async_copy: async copy atom for QKV load
249	        atom_async_copy = cute.make_copy_atom(
250	            cpasync.CopyG2SOp(cache_mode=cpasync.LoadCacheMode.GLOBAL),
251	            self.dtype,
252	            num_bits_per_copy=universal_copy_bits,
253	        )
254	        # atom_universal_copy: universal copy atom for O store
255	        atom_universal_copy = cute.make_copy_atom(
256	            cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(),
257	            self.dtype,
258	            num_bits_per_copy=universal_copy_bits,
259	        )
260	        # tQ_layout and tK_layout: thread layout for QK load
261	        tQK_shape_dim_1 = sQ_layout_atom.outer.shape[1] // async_copy_elems
262	        assert self.num_Q_load_threads % tQK_shape_dim_1 == 0, (
263	            "num_threads must be divisible by tQK_shape_dim_1"
264	        )
265	        assert self.num_producer_threads % tQK_shape_dim_1 == 0, (
266	            "num_threads must be divisible by tQK_shape_dim_1"
267	        )
268	        tQ_layout = cute.make_ordered_layout(
269	            (self.num_Q_load_threads // tQK_shape_dim_1, tQK_shape_dim_1),
270	            order=(1, 0),
271	        )
272	        tK_layout = cute.make_ordered_layout(
273	            (self.num_producer_threads // tQK_shape_dim_1, tQK_shape_dim_1),
274	            order=(1, 0),
275	        )
276	        # So that we don't have to check if we overshoot kBlockM when we load Q
277	        assert self.tile_m % tQ_layout.shape[0] == 0
278	        tV_shape_dim_1 = sV_layout_atom.outer.shape[1] // async_copy_elems
279	        tV_layout = cute.make_ordered_layout(
280	            (self.num_producer_threads // tV_shape_dim_1, tV_shape_dim_1),
281	            order=(1, 0),
282	        )
283	        # TODO: need a different layout for O if O dtype is not the same as V dtype
284	        # tO_layout: thread layout for O store
285	        tO_layout = cute.make_ordered_layout(
286	            (self.num_epilogue_threads // tV_shape_dim_1, tV_shape_dim_1),
287	            order=(1, 0),
288	        )
289	        # So that we don't have to check if we overshoot kBlockM when we store O
290	        assert self.tile_m % tO_layout.shape[0] == 0
291	
292	        # Value layouts for copies
293	        vQKV_layout = cute.make_layout((1, async_copy_elems))
294	        vO_layout = vQKV_layout
295	
296	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_Q = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(atom_async_copy, tQ_layout, vQKV_layout)
297	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_K = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(atom_async_copy, tK_layout, vQKV_layout)
298	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_V = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(atom_async_copy, tV_layout, vQKV_layout)
299	        # gmem_tiled_copy_O: tiled copy for O store
300	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_O = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(atom_universal_copy, tO_layout, vO_layout)
301

303	        raise NotImplementedError()

306	        raise NotImplementedError()

309	        raise NotImplementedError()

311	    @cute.jit
312	    def __call__(
313	        self,
314	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
315	        mK: cute.Tensor,
316	        mV: cute.Tensor,
317	        mO: cute.Tensor,
318	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
319	        softmax_scale: Float32,
320	        # Always keep stream as the last parameter (EnvStream: obtained implicitly via TVM FFI).
321	        stream: cuda.CUstream = None,
322	    ):
323	        """Configures and launches the flash attention kernel.
324	
325	        mQ/mK/mV/mO has same data types(supports fp16 and bf16) and same layout:
326	        (batch_size, seqlen_q, num_head, head_dim):(_, _, _, 1)
327	        """
328	        raise NotImplementedError()
329	
330	    @cute.jit
331	    def epilogue(
332	        self,
333	        acc_O: cute.Tensor,
334	        lse: cute.Tensor,
335	        mO: cute.Tensor,
336	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
337	        sO: cute.Tensor,
338	        seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
339	        gmem_tiled_copy_O: cute.TiledCopy,
340	        tma_atom_O: Optional[cute.CopyAtom],
341	        tiled_mma: cute.TiledMma,
342	        tidx: Int32,
343	        m_block: Int32,
344	        head_idx: Int32,
345	        batch_idx: Int32,
346	    ):
347	        # store acc_O
348	        rO = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_O, self.dtype)
349	        rO.store(acc_O.load().to(self.dtype))
350	        # Make sure all threads have finished reading V
351	        cute.arch.barrier(
352	            barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.Epilogue), number_of_threads=self.num_epilogue_threads
353	        )
354	        smem_copy_atom_O = utils.get_smem_store_atom(self.arch.major * 10 + self.arch.minor, self.dtype)
355	        smem_thr_copy_O = cute.make_tiled_copy_C(smem_copy_atom_O, tiled_mma).get_slice(tidx)
356	        taccOrO = smem_thr_copy_O.retile(rO)
357	        taccOsO = smem_thr_copy_O.partition_D(sO)
358	        # taccOsO = copy_utils.partition_D_position_independent(smem_thr_copy_O, sO)
359	        # copy acc O from rmem to smem with the smem copy atom
360	        cute.copy(smem_copy_atom_O, taccOrO, taccOsO)
361	
362	        cO = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv))
363	        pack_gqa = PackGQA(
364	            self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv, self.check_hdim_v_oob, self.qhead_per_kvhead
365	        )
366	
367	        # Write LSE from rmem -> gmem
368	        if const_expr(mLSE is not None):
369	            mLSE_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mLSE, batch_idx, dim=2)[None, head_idx]
370	            if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa):
371	                gLSE = cute.local_tile(mLSE_cur, (self.tile_m,), (m_block,))
372	                gLSE_expanded_layout = cute.append(
373	                    gLSE.layout, cute.make_layout((self.tile_hdimv,), stride=(0,))
374	                )
375	                gLSE_expanded = cute.make_tensor(gLSE.iterator, gLSE_expanded_layout)
376	                thr_mma = tiled_mma.get_slice(tidx)
377	                taccOgLSE = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(thr_mma.partition_C(gLSE_expanded))
378	                assert cute.size(taccOgLSE, mode=[0]) == cute.size(lse)
379	                taccOcO = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(thr_mma.partition_C(cO))
380	                t0accOcO = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(thr_mma.get_slice(0).partition_C(cO))
381	                # Only the thread corresponding to column 0 writes out the lse to gmem
382	                if taccOcO[0][1] == 0:
383	                    for m in cutlass.range(cute.size(taccOgLSE.shape[1]), unroll_full=True):
384	                        if (
385	                            t0accOcO[m, 0][0]
386	                            < seqlen.seqlen_q - m_block * self.tile_m - taccOcO[0][0]
387	                        ):
388	                            taccOgLSE[m, 0] = lse[m]
389	            else:
390	                pack_gqa.store_LSE(mLSE_cur, lse, tiled_mma, tidx, m_block, seqlen.seqlen_q)
391	
392	        ragged = self.use_tma_O and (seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q or seqlen.has_seqused_q)
393	        mO_cur = seqlen.offset_batch_Q(mO, batch_idx, dim=3, ragged=ragged)[None, None, head_idx]
394	        # thr_mma = tiled_mma.get_slice(tidx)
395	        # taccOgO = thr_mma.partition_C(gO)
396	        # cute.autovec_copy(rO, taccOgO)
397	        # sync to make sure all smem stores are done
398	        if const_expr(self.use_tma_O):
399	            # ensure smem writes are visible to TMA
400	            cute.arch.fence_view_async_shared()
401	            cute.arch.barrier_arrive(
402	                barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.Epilogue),
403	                number_of_threads=self.num_epilogue_threads + cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,
404	            )
405	            gO = cute.local_tile(mO_cur, (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv), (m_block, 0))
406	            store_O, _, _ = copy_utils.tma_get_copy_fn(
407	                tma_atom_O, 0, cute.make_layout(1), sO, gO, single_stage=True
408	            )
409	            warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx())
410	            if warp_idx == 4:
411	                cute.arch.barrier(
412	                    barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.Epilogue),
413	                    number_of_threads=self.num_epilogue_threads + cute.arch.WARP_SIZE,
414	                )
415	                store_O()
416	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_commit_group()
417	                cute.arch.cp_async_bulk_wait_group(0, read=True)
418	        else:
419	            cute.arch.barrier(
420	                barrier_id=int(NamedBarrierFwd.Epilogue),
421	                number_of_threads=self.num_epilogue_threads,
422	            )
423	            gmem_thr_copy_O = gmem_tiled_copy_O.get_slice(tidx)
424	            tOsO = gmem_thr_copy_O.partition_S(sO)
425	            tOrO = cute.make_fragment_like(tOsO, self.dtype)
426	            # load acc O from smem to rmem for wider vectorization
427	            cute.autovec_copy(tOsO, tOrO)
428	            if const_expr(not self.pack_gqa):
429	                gO = cute.local_tile(mO_cur, (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv), (m_block, 0))
430	                tOgO = gmem_thr_copy_O.partition_D(gO)
431	                tOcO = gmem_thr_copy_O.partition_S(cO)
432	                t0OcO = gmem_tiled_copy_O.get_slice(0).partition_S(cO)
433	                tOpO = utils.predicate_k(tOcO, limit=mO.shape[1])
434	                # copy acc O from rmem to gmem
435	                for rest_m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tOrO.shape[1])):
436	                    if (
437	                        t0OcO[0, rest_m, 0][0]
438	                        < seqlen.seqlen_q - m_block * self.tile_m - tOcO[0][0]
439	                    ):
440	                        cute.copy(
441	                            gmem_tiled_copy_O,
442	                            tOrO[None, rest_m, None],
443	                            tOgO[None, rest_m, None],
444	                            pred=tOpO[None, rest_m, None]
445	                            if const_expr(self.check_hdim_v_oob)
446	                            else None,
447	                        )
448	            else:
449	                pack_gqa.store_O(mO_cur, tOrO, gmem_tiled_copy_O, tidx, m_block, seqlen.seqlen_q)
450	
451	    @cute.jit
452	    def advance_pipeline(self, pipeline_index):
453	        return pipeline_index + 1 if pipeline_index < self.num_stages - 1 else 0
454	
455	    @cute.jit
456	    def load_Q(
457	        self,
458	        gmem_thr_copy: cute.TiledCopy,
459	        gQ: cute.Tensor,
460	        sQ: cute.Tensor,
461	        block: Int32,
462	        seqlen: Int32,
463	        headdim: Int32,
464	    ):
465	        tQsQ, tQgQ = gmem_thr_copy.partition_D(sQ), gmem_thr_copy.partition_S(gQ)
466	        cQ = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim))
467	        tQcQ = gmem_thr_copy.partition_S(cQ)
468	        t0QcQ = gmem_thr_copy.get_slice(0).partition_S(cQ)
469	        tQpQ = utils.predicate_k(tQcQ, limit=headdim)
470	        for m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tQsQ.shape[1])):
471	            # Instead of using tQcQ, we using t0QcQ and subtract the offset from the limit
472	            # (seqlen - block * kBlockM). This is because the entries of t0QcQ are known at compile time.
473	            if t0QcQ[0, m, 0][0] < seqlen - block * self.tile_m - tQcQ[0][0]:
474	                cute.copy(
475	                    gmem_thr_copy,
476	                    tQgQ[None, m, None],
477	                    tQsQ[None, m, None],
478	                    pred=tQpQ[None, m, None] if const_expr(self.check_hdim_oob) else None,
479	                )
480	            # We don't need to clear the sQ smem tiles since we'll only write out the valid outputs
481	
482	    @cute.jit
483	    def load_K(
484	        self,
485	        gmem_tiled_copy: cute.TiledCopy,
486	        tKgK: cute.Tensor,
487	        tKsK: cute.Tensor,
488	        tKcK: cute.Tensor,
489	        t0KcK: cute.Tensor,
490	        tKpK: cute.Tensor,
491	        block: Int32,
492	        smem_pipe_write: Int32,
493	        seqlen: Int32,
494	        need_predicates: cutlass.Constexpr,
495	    ):
496	        # Do we need to check if we overshoot kBlockN when we load K?
497	        is_even_n_smem_k = self.tile_n % gmem_tiled_copy.tiler_mn[0].shape == 0
498	        if const_expr(need_predicates or not is_even_n_smem_k):
499	            # Instead of using tKcK, we using t0KcK and subtract the offset from the limit
500	            # (seqlen - block * kBlockN). This is because the entries of t0KcK are known at compile time.
501	            if const_expr(is_even_n_smem_k):
502	                seqlen_limit = seqlen - block * self.tile_n
503	            else:
504	                if const_expr(not need_predicates):
505	                    seqlen_limit = self.tile_n
506	                else:
507	                    seqlen_limit = cutlass.min(seqlen - block * self.tile_n, self.tile_n)
508	            seqlen_limit -= tKcK[0][0]
509	            for n in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tKsK.shape[1])):
510	                if t0KcK[0, n, 0][0] < seqlen_limit:
511	                    cute.copy(
512	                        gmem_tiled_copy,
513	                        tKgK[None, n, None, block],
514	                        tKsK[
515	                            None, n, None, smem_pipe_write if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1) else 0
516	                        ],
517	                        pred=tKpK[None, n, None] if const_expr(self.check_hdim_oob) else None,
518	                    )
519	                # We don't need to clear the sK smem tiles since we'll mask out the scores anyway.
520	        else:
521	            cute.copy(
522	                gmem_tiled_copy,
523	                tKgK[None, None, None, block],
524	                tKsK[None, None, None, smem_pipe_write if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1) else 0],
525	                pred=tKpK if const_expr(self.check_hdim_oob) else None,
526	            )
527	
528	    @cute.jit
529	    def load_V(
530	        self,
531	        gmem_tiled_copy: cute.TiledCopy,
532	        tVgV: cute.Tensor,
533	        tVsV: cute.Tensor,
534	        tVcV: cute.Tensor,
535	        t0VcV: cute.Tensor,
536	        tVpV: cute.Tensor,
537	        block: Int32,
538	        smem_pipe_write: Int32,
539	        seqlen: Int32,
540	        need_predicates: cutlass.Constexpr,
541	    ):
542	        # Do we need to check if we overshoot kBlockN when we load V?
543	        is_even_n_smem_v = self.tile_n % gmem_tiled_copy.tiler_mn[0].shape == 0
544	        if const_expr(need_predicates or not is_even_n_smem_v):
545	            for n in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tVsV.shape[1])):
546	                # If kBlockN doesn't evenly divide the tiled copy, only the last `n` needs to be checked
547	                if (
548	                    is_even_n_smem_v
549	                    or n < cute.size(tVsV.shape[1]) - 1
550	                    or tVcV[0, n, 0][0] < self.tile_n
551	                ):
552	                    predicate = tVpV[None, n, None] if const_expr(self.check_hdim_v_oob) else None
553	                    if const_expr(need_predicates):
554	                        seqlen_limit = seqlen - block * self.tile_n - tVcV[0][0]
555	                        predicate_n = t0VcV[0, n, 0][0] < seqlen_limit
556	                        predicate = cute.make_fragment_like(tVpV[None, 0, None])
557	                        for k in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[1])):
558	                            for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[0])):
559	                                predicate[i, k] = (
560	                                    tVpV[i, n, k] if const_expr(self.check_hdim_v_oob) else True
561	                                ) and predicate_n
562	                    cute.copy(
563	                        gmem_tiled_copy,
564	                        tVgV[None, n, None, block],
565	                        tVsV[
566	                            None, n, None, smem_pipe_write if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1) else 0
567	                        ],
568	                        pred=predicate,
569	                    )
570	        else:
571	            cute.copy(
572	                gmem_tiled_copy,
573	                tVgV[None, None, None, block],
574	                tVsV[None, None, None, smem_pipe_write if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1) else 0],
575	                pred=tVpV if const_expr(self.check_hdim_v_oob) else None,
576	            )
577	
578	
579	class FlashAttentionForwardSm80(FlashAttentionForwardBase):
580	    def _get_smem_layout_atom(self):
581	        sQ_layout_atom = sm80_utils.get_smem_layout_atom(self.dtype, self.tile_hdim)
582	        sK_layout_atom = sQ_layout_atom
583	        sV_layout_atom = sm80_utils.get_smem_layout_atom(self.dtype, self.tile_hdimv)
584	        sO_layout_atom = sV_layout_atom
585	        sP_layout_atom = None
586	        return sQ_layout_atom, sK_layout_atom, sV_layout_atom, sO_layout_atom, sP_layout_atom
587	
588	    def _get_tiled_mma(self):
589	        tiled_mma_qk = cute.make_tiled_mma(
590	            warp.MmaF16BF16Op(self.dtype, Float32, (16, 8, 16)),
591	            (self.num_threads // 32, 1, 1),
592	            permutation_mnk=(self.num_threads // 32 * 16, 16, 16),
593	        )
594	        tiled_mma_pv = cute.make_tiled_mma(
595	            warp.MmaF16BF16Op(self.dtype, Float32, (16, 8, 16)),
596	            (self.num_threads // 32, 1, 1),
597	            permutation_mnk=(self.num_threads // 32 * 16, 16, 16),
598	        )
599	        return tiled_mma_qk, tiled_mma_pv
600	
601	    def _get_shared_storage_cls(self):
602	        sQ_struct, sK_struct, sV_struct = [
603	            cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cute.cosize(layout)], 1024]
604	            for layout in (self.sQ_layout, self.sK_layout, self.sV_layout)
605	        ]
606	        cosize_sQV = max(cute.cosize(self.sQ_layout), cute.cosize(self.sV_layout))
607	        sQV_struct = cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cosize_sQV], 1024]
608	
609	        @cute.struct
610	        class SharedStorageQKV:
611	            sV: sV_struct
612	            sQ: sQ_struct
613	            sK: sK_struct
614	
615	        @cute.struct
616	        class SharedStorageSharedQV:
617	            sQ: sQV_struct
618	            sK: sK_struct
619	
620	        return SharedStorageQKV if const_expr(not self.Q_in_regs) else SharedStorageSharedQV
621	
622	    @cute.jit
623	    def __call__(
624	        self,
625	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
626	        mK: cute.Tensor,
627	        mV: cute.Tensor,
628	        mO: cute.Tensor,
629	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
630	        softmax_scale: Float32,
631	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
632	        mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
633	        mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
634	        mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
635	        mPageTable: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
636	        window_size_left: Optional[Int32] = None,
637	        window_size_right: Optional[Int32] = None,
638	        learnable_sink: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
639	        blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
640	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
641	        # Always keep stream as the last parameter (EnvStream: obtained implicitly via TVM FFI).
642	        stream: cuda.CUstream = None,
643	    ):
644	        """Configures and launches the flash attention kernel.
645	
646	        mQ/mK/mV/mO has same data types(supports fp16 and bf16) and same layout:
647	        (batch_size, seqlen_q, num_head, head_dim):(_, _, _, 1)
648	        """
649	        assert learnable_sink is None, "Learnable sink is not supported in this kernel"
650	        self._check_type(
651	            *(t.element_type if t is not None else None for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mO, mLSE, mCuSeqlensQ, mCuSeqlensK, mSeqUsedQ, mSeqUsedK))
652	        )
653	        tiled_mma_qk, tiled_mma_pv = self._get_tiled_mma()
654	        self.num_mma_threads = tiled_mma_pv.size
655	        self.num_producer_threads = self.num_threads
656	        self.num_Q_load_threads = self.num_threads
657	        self.num_epilogue_threads = self.num_threads
658	        # self.use_tma_O = self.arch >= 90 and mCuSeqlensQ is None
659	        self.use_tma_O = self.arch >= Arch.sm_90
660	        self._setup_attributes()
661	        SharedStorage = self._get_shared_storage_cls()
662	        mQ, mK, mV, mO = [assume_tensor_aligned(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mO)]
663	        # Layout permutation: 4D non-varlen vs 3D varlen
664	        QO_layout_transpose = [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [0, 2, 1]
665	        KV_layout_transpose = [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is None) else [0, 2, 1]
666	        mQ, mO = [
667	            cute.make_tensor(t.iterator, cute.select(t.layout, mode=QO_layout_transpose))
668	            for t in (mQ, mO)
669	        ]
670	        mK, mV = [
671	            cute.make_tensor(t.iterator, cute.select(t.layout, mode=KV_layout_transpose))
672	            for t in (mK, mV)
673	        ]
674	        if const_expr(mLSE is not None):
675	            LSE_layout_transpose = [2, 1, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [1, 0]
676	            mLSE = cute.make_tensor(mLSE.iterator, cute.select(mLSE.layout, mode=LSE_layout_transpose))
677	        # TileScheduler for varlen, simple grid for non-varlen
678	        if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None or mSeqUsedQ is not None):
679	            TileScheduler = SingleTileVarlenScheduler
680	        else:
681	            TileScheduler = SingleTileScheduler
682	        num_batch = (
683	            mCuSeqlensQ.shape[0] - 1
684	            if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None)
685	            else mQ.shape[3]
686	        )
687	        tile_sched_args = TileSchedulerArguments(
688	            num_block=cute.ceil_div(mQ.shape[0], self.tile_m),
689	            num_head=cute.size(mQ.shape[2]),
690	            num_batch=num_batch,
691	            num_splits=1,
692	            seqlen_k=0,
693	            headdim=mQ.shape[1],
694	            headdim_v=mV.shape[1],
695	            total_q=cute.size(mQ.shape[0])
696	            if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None)
697	            else cute.size(mQ.shape[0]) * cute.size(mQ.shape[3]),
698	            tile_shape_mn=(self.tile_m, self.tile_n),
699	            qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
700	            mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
701	            mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedQ,
702	        )
703	        tile_sched_params = TileScheduler.to_underlying_arguments(tile_sched_args)
704	        grid_dim = TileScheduler.get_grid_shape(tile_sched_params)
705	        softmax_scale_log2, softmax_scale = utils.compute_softmax_scale_log2(softmax_scale, self.score_mod)
706	        fastdiv_mods = utils.compute_fastdiv_mods(mQ, mK, self.qhead_per_kvhead, self.pack_gqa, aux_data.tensors)
707	
708	        self.kernel(
709	            mQ,
710	            mK,
711	            mV,
712	            mO,
713	            mLSE,
714	            mCuSeqlensQ,
715	            mCuSeqlensK,
716	            mSeqUsedQ,
717	            mSeqUsedK,
718	            softmax_scale_log2,
719	            softmax_scale,
720	            window_size_left,
721	            window_size_right,
722	            self.sQ_layout,
723	            self.sK_layout,
724	            self.sV_layout,
725	            self.sO_layout,
726	            self.sP_layout,
727	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_Q,
728	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_K,
729	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_V,
730	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_O,
731	            tiled_mma_qk,
732	            tiled_mma_pv,
733	            SharedStorage,
734	            tile_sched_params,
735	            TileScheduler,
736	            aux_data,
737	            fastdiv_mods,
738	        ).launch(
739	            grid=grid_dim,
740	            block=[self.num_threads, 1, 1],
741	            smem=SharedStorage.size_in_bytes(),
742	            stream=stream,
743	        )
744	
745	    @cute.kernel
746	    def kernel(
747	        self,
748	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
749	        mK: cute.Tensor,
750	        mV: cute.Tensor,
751	        mO: cute.Tensor,
752	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
753	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
754	        mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
755	        mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
756	        mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
757	        softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
758	        softmax_scale: Optional[Float32],
759	        window_size_left: Optional[Int32],
760	        window_size_right: Optional[Int32],
761	        sQ_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
762	        sK_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
763	        sV_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
764	        sO_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
765	        sP_layout: cute.ComposedLayout | None,
766	        gmem_tiled_copy_Q: cute.TiledCopy,
767	        gmem_tiled_copy_K: cute.TiledCopy,
768	        gmem_tiled_copy_V: cute.TiledCopy,
769	        gmem_tiled_copy_O: cute.TiledCopy,
770	        tiled_mma_qk: cute.TiledMma,
771	        tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
772	        SharedStorage: cutlass.Constexpr,
773	        tile_sched_params,
774	        TileScheduler: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
775	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
776	        fastdiv_mods=None,
777	    ):
778	        # Thread index, block index
779	        tidx, _, _ = cute.arch.thread_idx()
780	
781	        tile_scheduler = TileScheduler.create(tile_sched_params)
782	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
783	        m_block, num_head, batch_size, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
784	
785	        block_info = BlockInfo(
786	            self.tile_m,
787	            self.tile_n,
788	            self.is_causal,
789	            self.is_local,
790	            False,  # is_split_kv
791	            window_size_left,
792	            window_size_right,
793	            qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
794	        )
795	        seqlen = SeqlenInfoQK.create(
796	            batch_idx=batch_size,
797	            seqlen_q_static=mQ.shape[0],
798	            seqlen_k_static=mK.shape[0],
799	            mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
800	            mCuSeqlensK=mCuSeqlensK,
801	            mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedQ,
802	            mSeqUsedK=mSeqUsedK,
803	        )
804	        n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(seqlen, m_block)
805	        # For varlen, wasted grid tiles (where batch_idx >= num_batch) will have
806	        # seqlen_q=seqlen_k=0 and n_block_max=0.  Clamp to 0 so we don't use a
807	        # negative block index for K/V loads; the load/store predicates already
808	        # guard all memory accesses when seqlen is 0.
809	        n_block = cutlass.max(n_block_max - 1, 0)
810	
811	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
812	        # Get the appropriate tiles for this thread block.
813	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
814	        blkQ_shape = (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim)
815	        blkK_shape = (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim)
816	        blkV_shape = (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv)
817	        num_head_kv = num_head // self.qhead_per_kvhead
818	        if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q):
819	            mQ_cur = mQ[None, None, num_head, batch_size]
820	        else:
821	            mQ_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_q, 0), mQ[None, None, num_head])
822	        if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_k):
823	            mK_cur = mK[None, None, num_head_kv, batch_size]
824	            mV_cur = mV[None, None, num_head_kv, batch_size]
825	        else:
826	            mK_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_k, 0), mK[None, None, num_head_kv])
827	            mV_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_k, 0), mV[None, None, num_head_kv])
828	        gQ = cute.local_tile(mQ_cur, blkQ_shape, (m_block, 0))
829	        gK = cute.local_tile(mK_cur, blkK_shape, (None, 0))
830	        gV = cute.local_tile(mV_cur, blkV_shape, (None, 0))
831	
832	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
833	        # Get shared memory buffer
834	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
835	        smem = cutlass.utils.SmemAllocator()
836	        storage = smem.allocate(SharedStorage)
837	        sQ = storage.sQ.get_tensor(sQ_layout)
838	        sK = storage.sK.get_tensor(sK_layout)
839	        if const_expr(not self.Q_in_regs):
840	            sV = storage.sV.get_tensor(sV_layout)
841	        else:
842	            sV = cute.make_tensor(cute.recast_ptr(sQ.iterator, dtype=self.dtype), sV_layout)
843	        # Transpose view of V to tensor with layout (head_dim_v, tile_n) for tiled mma
844	        sVt = layout_utils.transpose_view(sV)
845	
846	        gmem_thr_copy_K = gmem_tiled_copy_K.get_slice(tidx)
847	        gmem_thr_copy_V = gmem_tiled_copy_V.get_slice(tidx)
848	        # (CPY_Atom, CPY_N, CPY_K, n_block)
849	        tKsK, tKgK = gmem_thr_copy_K.partition_D(sK), gmem_thr_copy_K.partition_S(gK)
850	        # (CPY_Atom, CPY_N, CPY_K, n_block)
851	        tVsV, tVgV = gmem_thr_copy_V.partition_D(sV), gmem_thr_copy_V.partition_S(gV)
852	
853	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
854	        # Tile MMA compute thread partitions and allocate accumulators
855	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
856	        thr_mma_qk = tiled_mma_qk.get_slice(tidx)
857	        thr_mma_pv = tiled_mma_pv.get_slice(tidx)
858	        tSrQ = thr_mma_qk.make_fragment_A(thr_mma_qk.partition_A(sQ))
859	        tSrK = thr_mma_qk.make_fragment_B(thr_mma_qk.partition_B(sK[None, None, 0]))
860	        tOrVt = thr_mma_pv.make_fragment_B(thr_mma_pv.partition_B(sVt[None, None, 0]))
861	        acc_shape_O = thr_mma_pv.partition_shape_C((self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv))
862	        acc_O = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_O, Float32)
863	        acc_O.fill(0.0)
864	
865	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
866	        # Smem copy atom tiling
867	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
868	        smem_copy_atom_QK = cute.make_copy_atom(
869	            warp.LdMatrix8x8x16bOp(transpose=False, num_matrices=4),
870	            self.dtype,
871	        )
872	        smem_copy_atom_V = cute.make_copy_atom(
873	            warp.LdMatrix8x8x16bOp(transpose=True, num_matrices=4),
874	            self.dtype,
875	        )
876	        smem_thr_copy_Q = utils.make_tiled_copy_A(smem_copy_atom_QK, tiled_mma_qk).get_slice(tidx)
877	        smem_thr_copy_K = utils.make_tiled_copy_B(smem_copy_atom_QK, tiled_mma_qk).get_slice(tidx)
878	        smem_thr_copy_V = utils.make_tiled_copy_B(smem_copy_atom_V, tiled_mma_pv).get_slice(tidx)
879	
880	        tSsQ = smem_thr_copy_Q.partition_S(sQ)
881	        tSsK = smem_thr_copy_K.partition_S(sK)
882	        tOsVt = smem_thr_copy_V.partition_S(sVt)
883	
884	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
885	        # Predicate: Mark indices that need to copy when problem_shape isn't a multiple
886	        # of tile_shape
887	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
888	        # Construct identity layout for KV
889	        cK = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim))
890	        tKcK = gmem_thr_copy_K.partition_S(cK)
891	        t0KcK = gmem_thr_copy_K.get_slice(0).partition_S(cK)
892	        if const_expr(self.tile_hdim == self.tile_hdimv):
893	            tVcV = tKcK
894	            t0VcV = t0KcK
895	        else:
896	            cV = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv))
897	            tVcV = gmem_thr_copy_V.partition_S(cV)
898	            t0VcV = gmem_thr_copy_V.get_slice(0).partition_S(cV)
899	        # Allocate predicate tensors for m and n, here we only allocate the tile of k, and
900	        # use "if" on the mn dimension.
901	        # This is to reduce register pressure and gets 2-3% performance gain.
902	        tKpK = utils.predicate_k(tKcK, limit=mK.shape[1])
903	        if const_expr(self.same_hdim_kv):
904	            tVpV = tKpK
905	        else:
906	            tVpV = utils.predicate_k(tVcV, limit=mV.shape[1])
907	
908	        # shape: (atom_v_m * rest_m)
909	        softmax = Softmax.create(
910	            softmax_scale_log2,
911	            num_rows=acc_O.shape[0][0] * acc_O.shape[1],
912	            softmax_scale=softmax_scale,
913	        )
914	        softmax.reset()
915	
916	        # group parameters for compute_one_n_block
917	        mma_params = SimpleNamespace(
918	            thr_mma_qk=thr_mma_qk,
919	            thr_mma_pv=thr_mma_pv,
920	            tSrQ=tSrQ,
921	            tSrK=tSrK,
922	            tOrVt=tOrVt,
923	            acc_O=acc_O,
924	        )
925	        smem_copy_params = SimpleNamespace(
926	            smem_thr_copy_Q=smem_thr_copy_Q,
927	            smem_thr_copy_K=smem_thr_copy_K,
928	            smem_thr_copy_V=smem_thr_copy_V,
929	            tSsQ=tSsQ,
930	            tSsK=tSsK,
931	            tOsVt=tOsVt,
932	        )
933	        load_K = partial(
934	            self.load_K, gmem_tiled_copy_K, tKgK, tKsK, tKcK, t0KcK, tKpK, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_k
935	        )
936	        load_V = partial(
937	            self.load_V, gmem_tiled_copy_V, tVgV, tVsV, tVcV, t0VcV, tVpV, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_k
938	        )
939	
940	        compute_one_n_block = partial(
941	            self.compute_one_n_block,
942	            mma_params=mma_params,
943	            smem_copy_params=smem_copy_params,
944	            softmax=softmax,
945	            load_K=load_K,
946	            load_V=load_V,
947	            score_mod=self.score_mod,
948	            batch_idx=batch_size,
949	            head_idx=num_head,
950	            m_block=m_block,
951	            aux_data=aux_data,
952	            fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
953	        )
954	
955	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
956	        # Prologue
957	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
958	        # Start async loads of the last mn-tile, where we take care of the mn residue
959	        gmem_thr_copy_Q = gmem_tiled_copy_Q.get_slice(tidx)
960	        self.load_Q(gmem_thr_copy_Q, gQ, sQ, m_block, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_q, headdim=mQ.shape[1])
961	        cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
962	
963	        def preprocess_Q():
964	            cute.arch.cp_async_wait_group(self.num_stages * 2 - 1)
965	            if const_expr(self.Q_in_regs):
966	                cute.arch.barrier()
967	                tSrQ_copy_view = smem_thr_copy_Q.retile(tSrQ)
968	                cute.copy(smem_thr_copy_Q, tSsQ, tSrQ_copy_view)
969	
970	        # If Q_in_regs, we load Q, then load 1 stage of K, then (optionally) rotate Q and
971	        # read from smem_q to registers, then load V.
972	        # If !Q_in_regs, we load Q, load all stages of K & V, then (optionally) rotate Q.
973	        if const_expr(self.Q_in_regs):
974	            load_K(n_block, smem_pipe_write=0, need_predicates=True)
975	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
976	            preprocess_Q()
977	            cute.arch.barrier()  # Make sure all threads have read smem_q before loading V
978	
979	        for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_stages):
980	            if const_expr(not self.Q_in_regs or stage > 0):
981	                if stage == 0 or n_block - stage >= 0:
982	                    load_K(n_block - stage, smem_pipe_write=stage, need_predicates=stage == 0)
983	                cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
984	            if const_expr(stage < self.num_stages - 1):
985	                if stage == 0 or n_block - stage >= 0:
986	                    load_V(n_block - stage, smem_pipe_write=stage, need_predicates=stage == 0)
987	                cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
988	        if const_expr(not self.Q_in_regs):
989	            preprocess_Q()
990	
991	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
992	        # Mainloop
993	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
994	        # Start processing of the first n-block.
995	        # For performance reason, we separate out two kinds of iterations:
996	        # those that need masking on S, and those that don't.
997	        # We need masking on S for the very last block when K and V has length not multiple of tile_n.
998	        # We also need masking on S if it's causal, for the last several blocks.
999	        mask = AttentionMask(
1000	            self.tile_m,
1001	            self.tile_n,
1002	            seqlen,
1003	            window_size_left,
1004	            window_size_right,
1005	            self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1006	        )
1007	        mask_fn = partial(
1008	            mask.apply_mask,
1009	            batch_idx=batch_size,
1010	            head_idx=num_head,
1011	            m_block=m_block,
1012	            thr_mma=thr_mma_qk,
1013	            mask_causal=self.is_causal,
1014	            mask_local=self.is_local,
1015	            aux_data=aux_data,
1016	            fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods if const_expr(self.mask_mod is not None) else None,
1017	        )
1018	
1019	        # First iteration with seqlen masking
1020	        smem_pipe_read = Int32(0)
1021	        smem_pipe_write = Int32(self.num_stages - 1)
1022	        compute_one_n_block(
1023	            n_block,
1024	            smem_pipe_read,
1025	            smem_pipe_write,
1026	            is_first_n_block=True,
1027	            seqlen=seqlen,
1028	            mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=True),
1029	        )
1030	        smem_pipe_read = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_read)
1031	        smem_pipe_write = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write)
1032	        # Next couple of iterations with causal masking
1033	        if const_expr(self.is_causal or self.is_local):
1034	            n_block_min_causal_local_mask = block_info.get_n_block_min_causal_local_mask(
1035	                seqlen, m_block, n_block_min
1036	            )
1037	            for n_tile in cutlass.range(n_block_max - 1 - n_block_min_causal_local_mask, unroll=1):
1038	                n_block = n_block_max - 2 - n_tile
1039	                compute_one_n_block(
1040	                    n_block,
1041	                    smem_pipe_read,
1042	                    smem_pipe_write,
1043	                    seqlen=seqlen,
1044	                    mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=True),
1045	                )
1046	                smem_pipe_read = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_read)
1047	                smem_pipe_write = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write)
1048	        # The remaining iterations have no masking
1049	        for n_tile in cutlass.range(n_block, unroll=1):
1050	            compute_one_n_block(
1051	                n_block - n_tile - 1, smem_pipe_read, smem_pipe_write,
1052	                seqlen=seqlen, is_first_n_block=False,
1053	                mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=False)
1054	            )
1055	            smem_pipe_read = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_read)
1056	            smem_pipe_write = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write)
1057	        # TODO: local
1058	
1059	        # normalize acc_O by row_sum and calculate the lse
1060	        row_scale = softmax.finalize()
1061	        softmax.rescale_O(acc_O, row_scale)
1062	
1063	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1064	        # Epilogue
1065	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1066	        # reuse sQ's data iterator
1067	        sO = cute.make_tensor(sQ.iterator, sO_layout)
1068	        self.epilogue(
1069	            acc_O,
1070	            softmax.row_sum,
1071	            mO,
1072	            mLSE,
1073	            sO,
1074	            seqlen,
1075	            gmem_tiled_copy_O,
1076	            None,
1077	            tiled_mma_pv,
1078	            tidx,
1079	            m_block,
1080	            num_head,
1081	            batch_size,
1082	        )
1083	
1084	    @cute.jit
1085	    def compute_one_n_block(
1086	        self,
1087	        n_block: Int32,
1088	        smem_pipe_read: Int32,
1089	        smem_pipe_write: Int32,
1090	        mma_params: SimpleNamespace,
1091	        smem_copy_params: SimpleNamespace,
1092	        softmax: Softmax,
1093	        load_K: Callable,
1094	        load_V: Callable,
1095	        score_mod: Callable | None,
1096	        batch_idx: cutlass.Int32,
1097	        head_idx: cutlass.Int32,
1098	        m_block: cutlass.Int32,
1099	        seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1100	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
1101	        fastdiv_mods=None,
1102	        mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1103	        is_first_n_block: cutlass.Constexpr = False,
1104	        check_inf: cutlass.Constexpr = True,
1105	    ):
1106	        """Compute one n_block of S/O.
1107	
1108	        This function provides different variants for processing the first n block versus
1109	        subsequent blocks.
1110	        """
1111	
1112	        def sync():
1113	            cute.arch.cp_async_wait_group(self.num_stages * 2 - 2)
1114	            cute.arch.barrier()
1115	
1116	        acc_shape_S = mma_params.thr_mma_qk.partition_shape_C((self.tile_m, self.tile_n))
1117	        acc_S = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_S, Float32)
1118	        acc_S.fill(0.0)
1119	        # wait for smem tile QK before mma calculation for S
1120	        sync()
1121	
1122	        # need predicates for the first tile
1123	        def load_V_next():
1124	            if self.num_stages == 1 or n_block - self.num_stages + 1 >= 0:
1125	                load_V(
1126	                    n_block - self.num_stages + 1,
1127	                    smem_pipe_write,
1128	                    need_predicates=is_first_n_block and self.num_stages == 1,
1129	                )
1130	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
1131	
1132	        load_V_next()
1133	        sm80_utils.gemm(
1134	            mma_params.thr_mma_qk,
1135	            acc_S,
1136	            mma_params.tSrQ,
1137	            mma_params.tSrK,
1138	            smem_copy_params.tSsQ,
1139	            smem_copy_params.tSsK[
1140	                None, None, None, smem_pipe_read if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1) else 0
1141	            ],
1142	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_Q,
1143	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_K,
1144	            # hook_fn=load_V_next,
1145	            A_in_regs=self.Q_in_regs,
1146	        )
1147	        if const_expr(score_mod is not None):
1148	            self.apply_score_mod(
1149	                mma_params.thr_mma_qk,
1150	                batch_idx,
1151	                head_idx,
1152	                m_block,
1153	                acc_S,
1154	                n_block,
1155	                softmax_scale=softmax.softmax_scale,
1156	                seqlen=seqlen,
1157	                aux_data=aux_data,
1158	                fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
1159	            )
1160	
1161	        smem_pipe_write = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write)
1162	
1163	        def load_K_next():
1164	            if n_block - self.num_stages >= 0:
1165	                load_K(n_block - self.num_stages, smem_pipe_write, need_predicates=False)
1166	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
1167	
1168	        # wait for smem tile V for O
1169	        if const_expr(self.num_stages == 1):
1170	            sync()
1171	            load_K_next()
1172	        if const_expr(mask_fn is not None):
1173	            mask_fn(acc_S, n_block=n_block)
1174	        row_scale = softmax.online_softmax(acc_S, is_first=is_first_n_block, check_inf=check_inf)
1175	        softmax.rescale_O(mma_params.acc_O, row_scale)
1176	        rP = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_S, self.dtype)
1177	        rP.store(acc_S.load().to(self.dtype))
1178	        tOrP = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(rP)
1179	        if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1):
1180	            sync()
1181	            load_K_next()
1182	        sm80_utils.gemm_rs(
1183	            mma_params.thr_mma_pv,
1184	            mma_params.acc_O,
1185	            tOrP,
1186	            mma_params.tOrVt,
1187	            smem_copy_params.tOsVt[
1188	                None, None, None, smem_pipe_read if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1) else 0
1189	            ],
1190	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_V,
1191	            # hook_fn=load_K_next,
1192	        )
1193	        # if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1):
1194	        #     load_K_next()
1195	    @cute.jit
1196	    def apply_score_mod(
1197	        self,
1198	        thr_mma_qk,
1199	        batch_idx,
1200	        head_idx,
1201	        m_block,
1202	        acc_S,
1203	        n_block,
1204	        softmax_scale,
1205	        seqlen,
1206	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
1207	        fastdiv_mods=None,
1208	    ):
1209	        # Prepare index tensor
1210	        cS = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_m, self.tile_n))
1211	        cS = cute.domain_offset((m_block * self.tile_m, n_block * self.tile_n), cS)
1212	        tScS = thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cS)
1213	
1214	        apply_score_mod_inner(
1215	            acc_S,
1216	            tScS,
1217	            self.score_mod,
1218	            batch_idx,
1219	            head_idx,
1220	            softmax_scale,
1221	            self.score_vec_size,
1222	            self.qk_acc_dtype,
1223	            aux_data,
1224	            fastdiv_mods,
1225	            seqlen_info=seqlen,
1226	            constant_q_idx=None,
1227	            qhead_per_kvhead=self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1228	        )
1229	
1230	
1231	# SM90 forward pass moved to flash_fwd_sm90.py; re-export for backward compatibility
1232	def __getattr__(name):
1233	    if name == "FlashAttentionForwardSm90":
1234	        from flash_attn.cute.flash_fwd_sm90 import FlashAttentionForwardSm90
1235	        return FlashAttentionForwardSm90
1236	    raise AttributeError(f"module {__name__!r} has no attribute {name!r}")
1237
